content: (The sky is a vast, clear expanse, with barely a cloud in sight, offering a moment of tranquility.) (Characters nearby (from nearest to furthest): Whiterun Guard, Idolaf Battle-Born, Cinia, Adrianne Avenicci, chicken) (MJR: ...; Whiterun Guard: Halt! City's closed with the dragons about. Official business only.) (MJR: Will this change your mind? (67 gold); Whiterun Guard: Welcome to Whiterun, friend. Go right on in. ) (MJR dropped/gave 67 Gold) (Daegon unequipped Firebolt) (Daegon equipped ) (Daegon unequipped Soul Trap) (Daegon equipped Soul Trap) (The location is now Drunken Huntsman.) (Characters nearby (from nearest to furthest): Daegon, Nazeem, Anoriath) (Ahlam equipped nolight armor) (Ahlam unequipped Spicy Girl Bikini Panty) (Ahlam unequipped Iron Dagger) (Ahlam unequipped Spicy Girl Bikini Bra) (Ahlam unequipped DDA Sandals)

Elrindir: Late night for you, Jenassa. Still nursing that mead after the city's gates nearly stayed shut? Dragons got everyone on edge. Jenassa: Edges are for blades, not nerves. Heard the guards turned away half the fools trying to stumble in. Good riddance—more room for real shadows like me. Ahlam: Shadows or not, it's a relief to be inside somewhere warm.

(*You are observing the following:* In this dimly lit interior scene, viewed from a first-person perspective, a sturdy wooden structure dominates the space with exposed beams and rafters overhead, casting soft shadows across weathered stone and timber walls. Flickering orange flames rise from a central hearth pit on the left, illuminating a large iron pot suspended over it and a nearby wooden barrel, while scattered cookware and a rumpled red blanket on a simple bed add to the lived-in feel of the room. To the right, a set of narrow wooden stairs ascends along the wall, leading upward into shadow. Directly ahead, a tall female figure with long white hair and pointed ears stands prominently, clad in ornate gray armor adorned with metallic accents, her right arm extended as if wielding a drawn blade that glows faintly with firelight. Behind her, a pair of heavy wooden double doors, framed by arched stone, stand slightly ajar against a neutral-toned floor scattered with rugs. The overall atmosphere is warm yet rustic, with subtle starlight filtering through high, narrow windows in the ceiling.)
